description: The map displays a spatial representation of a Natura 2000 (N2K) site, specifically site code FR7200672 in France, and its associated buffered Area of Interest (AoI). Multiple irregularly shaped light blue polygons, each labelled "FR7200672", represent individual components or patches of the Natura 2000 site. These site components are entirely encompassed by a larger, contiguous, irregularly shaped light peach-coloured polygon. This peach-coloured area represents the N2K product coverage, which includes a 2 km buffer zone around the selected Natura 2000 site boundaries, as used by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) N2K product. The map shows one version of the site boundaries and their buffered AoI. No scale bar, compass, or explicit legend is present in the image.
